# Print Direct Check

The Print Direct Check screen is
 used to print a copy of a specified check for a specified bank account.

1. Enter the bank account code.Note: During entry in this screen, Spectrum automatically
 disallows any accounts that are not bank accounts. In other words, credit card
 accounts are not permitted in this screen.

1. Enter the check number.

1. Click Preview.[Review the MICR Check Procedures Guide](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/ec592d80-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3TkRe4MsaVagL2E9yYgeECfGli5SK_AQJ76JcUthtqA&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22MICR_Checks_Procedures_v1423.pdf%22)
